result.stdout:
Usage: RazorScanner [command]

RazorScanner

Commands:
  search-parameter    Search all the occurrences of given parameter for a component.
  search-component    Search all the occurrences of the given component

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: RazorScanner [command]

RazorScanner

Commands:
  search-parameter    Search all the occurrences of given parameter for a component.
  search-component    Search all the occurrences of the given component

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: RazorScanner search-component [--directory <String>] [--component-name <String>] [--summary] [--help]

Search all the occurrences of the given component

Options:
  -d, --directory <String>         The directory where the search will be done.
  -c, --component-name <String>    The name of the component to search. (Required)
  -s, --summary                    
  -h, --help                       Show help message

commands.payload:

  -c, --component-name <String>    The name of the component to search. (Required)
  -s, --summary                    
  -h, --help                       Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: RazorScanner search-parameter [--directory <String>] [--component-name <String>] [--help] parameter-names0 ... parameter-namesN

Search all the occurrences of given parameter for a component.

Arguments:
  0: parameter-names     (Required)

Options:
  -d, --directory <String>         The directory where the search will be done.
  -c, --component-name <String>    The name of the component to search. (Required)
  -h, --help                       Show help message
